message:
test(quic_core): fill QH3-U2 codec/transport-parameter edge-case gaps

Adds 20 tests covering:
- VarInt decode on empty, truncated 4-byte, and truncated 8-byte inputs
- VarInt encoding size verification at all boundary thresholds
- TransportParameters empty/single/all-fields/unknown roundtrips
- TransportParameters truncated value body detection
- QuicCoreError Display for all 8 variants and std::error::Error impl
- ConnectionId empty/max-length edge cases
- PacketHeader::decode on empty input
- LongHeader Handshake and ZeroRtt roundtrips
- Packet number width overflow and invalid length rejection
- Long header payload_length < pn_len rejection
- LongPacketType and UnknownTransportParameter derive coverage

Total quic_core tests: 36 (was 16).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
